OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: The type of the connector. Must be STREAM.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream created in the OpenCTI UI.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen to delete events in the stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Set to true unless synchronizing between OpenCTI platforms.

JIRA_URL.description: The URL of the Jira server (e.g., https://yourinstance.atlassian.net).

JIRA_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to Jira.

JIRA_LOGIN_EMAIL.description: Email address for Jira account with API access.

JIRA_PROJECT_KEY.description: Jira project key (not name) for issue creation.

JIRA_ISSUE_TYPE_NAME.description: Issue type to create in Jira (e.g., Epic, Task, Bug, Story).

JIRA_CUSTOM_FIELDS_VALUES.description: Comma-separated values for custom fields (same order as keys).
